proof_boundary: This artifact proves r_1''(t)<=600/t^2 only for the first Newman summand at lambda=-100 on 320<=t<=1000. It does not prove the remaining ray, full-kernel order seven, PF-infinity, RH, or Lambda<=0.

rows.claim: The fourth-nested first-summand curvature ceiling holds continuously from t=320 through t=1000.
